div1.entryFree: Up, prepos. denoting motion from a lower to a higher place, opposed to down: runs o' horseback up a hill perpendicular, H4A II, 4, 378. as you go up the stairs into the lobby, Hml. IV, 3, 39. you do climb up it now, Lr. IV, 6, 2 (Qq climb it up). Applied to a horizontal direction: up Fish Street! down Saint Magnus' Corner! H6B IV, 8, 1. she says up and down the town that her eldest son is like you, H4B II, 1, 114 (cf. Down).
